preamble: The voiceless aspirated retroflex affricate [ʈʂʰ] merges with the voiceless postalveolar affricate [tʃ], often involving simultaneous deaspiration.

examples.note: Complex merger involving loss of both retroflexion and aspiration.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
